name: Algood Pickleball/Tennis Courts
description: Algood Pickleball Courts is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Algood, TN. There are 2 outdoor asphalt courts. The lines are overlaid on a tennis court, so the net is a little taller than a normal pickleball net. The courts are free. Dual Lined for Tennis. May want to bring weights to lower nets to 34" in the center.

name: Baxter Courts
description: Baxter Courts is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Baxter, TN. There are 2 outdoor courts. The lines are overlaid on a tennis court, so the net is a little taller than a normal pickleball net. The courts are free. Players have access to lights.

name: Cane Creek Gymnasium
description: Cane Creek Gymnasium is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Cookeville, TN. There are 3 indoor courts. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. Reservations are not available. The courts are free. Amenities include food, restrooms, water, and lights.
open_play_schedule: We have Open Play, first come first to play format. Players rotate in as they arrive. Due to summer programming, we only have Thursday 6-9pm and Saturday 8am-12pm available for open play.

name: Cookeville Community Center
description: Come play pickleball at Cookeville Community Center in Cookeville, TN! There are 3 outdoor asphalt courts. The lines are overlaid on a tennis court, so the net is a little taller than a normal pickleball net. The courts are free. Players have access to restrooms and water.

name: Cumberland Cove Plateau Picklers
description: Come play pickleball at Cumberland Cove Plateau Picklers in Monterey, TN! There are 4 outdoor concrete courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. The courts are private. The facility includes amenities like lights.
hours: Mon-Fri 9:00 am to 1:00 pm [email protected] Attention Before you buy property in Cumberland Cove, note that this is a deed-restricted community.

name: First United Methodist Church
description: First United Methodist Church is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Cookeville, TN. There are 3 indoor acrylic courts. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. You can’t reserve the courts. The courts are private. The facility includes amenities like lights, restrooms, water, and wheelchair accessibility.

name: Willow Avenue
description: Come play pickleball at Willow Avenue in Cookeville, TN! There are 4 asphalt and concrete courts. 2 are indoors and 2 are outdoors. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. The facility includes amenities like restrooms and water. The courts are private. Reservations are not available.
